name: SubTask moved in Kanban (To Do → In Progress)

parameters.subject: =Task Started: {{$json.subtask_title}}
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.project_manager_firstname}} {{$json.project_manager_lastname}},

The subtask {{$json.subtask_title}} has been moved to {{$json.new_subtask_status}}, indicating that work has commenced.

Subtask Details

Subtask Title {{$json.subtask_title}}
Parent Task {{$json.parent_task_title}}
Started By {{$json.started_by_firstname}} {{$json.started_by_lastname}}
Subtask Start Date {{$json.subtask_start_date}}
Subtask End Date {{$json.subtask_end_date}}
Project Name {{$json.project_title}}
Milestone Name {{$json.milestone_title || 'N/A'}}
Estimated Time (hrs) {{$json.subtask_estimated_time}}
Subtask Link View Subtask Details

This update is shared for visibility and tracking purposes.

Regards,
Project Monitoring Team

parameters.query:
WITH latest_subtask_status AS (
  SELECT
    tsl.*,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY tsl.task_management_id
      ORDER BY tsl.created_at DESC
    ) AS rn
  FROM task_status_logs tsl
  WHERE tsl.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 140 MINUTE
)

SELECT
  lts.id                   AS subtask_status_log_id,
  lts.status               AS new_subtask_status,
  lts.created_at           AS status_changed_at,
  lts.created_by_id        AS started_by,

  su.firstname             AS started_by_firstname,
  su.lastname              AS started_by_lastname,
  su.email                 AS started_by_email,

  st.id                    AS subtask_id,
  st.title                 AS subtask_title,
  st.description           AS subtask_description,
  st.priority              AS subtask_priority,
  st.target_date           AS subtask_target_date,
  st.estimated_hour        AS subtask_estimated_time,
  CONVERT_TZ(st.expected_start_date, '+00:00', '+05:30') AS subtask_start_date,
  CONVERT_TZ(st.target_date, '+00:00', '+05:30') AS subtask_end_date,

  st.parent_id             AS parent_task_id,
  pt.title                 AS parent_task_title,

  -- Milestone from parent task
  m.id                     AS milestone_id,
  m.title                  AS milestone_title,

  -- Project from subtask OR parent task
  pm.id                    AS project_id,
  pm.title                 AS project_title,

  pm_owner.email           AS project_manager_email,
  pm_owner.firstname       AS project_manager_firstname,
  pm_owner.lastname        AS project_manager_lastname

FROM latest_subtask_status lts

-- Subtask itself
LEFT JOIN task_managements st
  ON st.id = lts.task_management_id

-- Parent task
LEFT JOIN task_managements pt
  ON pt.id = st.parent_id

-- Milestone (via parent task)
LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = pt.milestone_id

-- Project (from subtask or parent)
LEFT JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = COALESCE(st.project_management_id, pt.project_management_id)

-- Project manager info
LEFT JOIN spree_users pm_owner
  ON pm_owner.id = pm.owner_id

-- User who changed status
LEFT JOIN spree_users su
  ON su.id = lts.created_by_id

WHERE 
  lts.rn = 1
  AND st.parent_id IS NOT NULL;  -- Only subtasks

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.query:
WITH latest_task_status AS (
  SELECT
    tsl.*,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY tsl.task_management_id
      ORDER BY tsl.created_at DESC
    ) AS rn
  FROM task_status_logs tsl
  WHERE tsl.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE
)

SELECT
  lts.id                 AS task_status_log_id,
  lts.status             AS new_task_status,
  lts.created_at         AS status_changed_at,
  lts.created_by_id      AS started_by,

  su.firstname           AS started_by_firstname,
  su.lastname            AS started_by_lastname,
  su.email               AS started_by_email,

  tm.id                  AS task_id,
  tm.title               AS task_title,

  tm.parent_id           AS parent_task_id,

  pm.id                  AS project_id,
  pm.title               AS project_title,

  pm_owner.email         AS project_manager_email,
  pm_owner.firstname     AS project_manager_firstname,
  pm_owner.lastname      AS project_manager_lastname

FROM latest_task_status lts

LEFT JOIN task_managements tm
  ON tm.id = lts.task_management_id

LEFT JOIN task_managements parent_tm
  ON parent_tm.id = tm.parent_id

-- 🔥 KEY FIX: take project from self OR parent
LEFT JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = COALESCE(
    tm.project_management_id,
    parent_tm.project_management_id
  )

LEFT JOIN spree_users pm_owner
  ON pm_owner.id = pm.owner_id

LEFT JOIN spree_users su
  ON su.id = lts.created_by_id

WHERE lts.rn = 1;

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database
